< Flats and textures
  Flats and textures [view]
SRB2 levels Single Player: GFZ • THZ • DSZ • CEZ • ACZ • RVZ • DCZ • GEZ • ERZ
Other: NiGHTS • Mario • Special Stage • Multiplayer • SRB1 Remake
Other themes Caves/Cliffs • Xmas • Disco • Forts • GHZ • HPZ • Ice/Snow • Jungle • Sand • Forest
Miscellaneous Colors • Generic • Old • SA-SRB2 • Miscellaneous • Skies

The following is an exhibit of flats and textures seen in the Christmas theme, which is commonly used in snowy and icy areas. This theme was originally used to replace graphics when the deprecated Christmas mode was active. Therefore, it includes variants of the GFZ and THZ texture set, as well as additional decoration.

Greenflower Zone

Flats Textures
XMSFLR01 XMAS01
XMSFLR02 XMAS02
XMSFLR05 XMAS03
XMSFLR06 XMAS04
XMSFLR08 XMAS18
XMSFLR09 XMAS19
XMSFLR10 XMAS20
XMSFLR11 XMAS23
XMSFLR17
